## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with David De Lallo for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [David has extensive experience in AI content creation, thought leadership, and project management](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Role involves managing 3-5 clients, editing content, and providing technical feedback on GrowthX's AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [David's background aligns well with GrowthX's needs, combining content expertise with technical understanding](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly growing (1-2 new clients/week) and focused on efficient scaling and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Role Overview

  - [Technical Managing Editor position within a pod structure](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Manage 3-5 clients, oversee 1-2 content managers (not direct reports)](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Edit and check work output, manage long-tail deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Client-facing responsibilities: progress updates, call follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Work with internal AI platform (2 months old), provide technical feedback](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Focus on improving efficiency and automating editing processes](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### David's Background and Experience

  - [Former executive editor for AI at McKinsey (6 years)](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Currently freelancing for 2 years, producing thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Clients include major consulting firms, engineering tech companies, AI model makers](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Experience with AI tools: Claude, ChatGPT, MidJourney, video tools](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Manages contractors, provides detailed feedback and training](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)

### Content Production and Management

  - [Thought leadership articles, reports on AI/climate change impacts](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Demand generation content (e.g., digital twins, market trends)](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Experience developing content strategies and interactive prototypes](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Uses spreadsheets for project management (previously used Airtable at McKinsey)](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Scales work through a network of trusted contractors](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

### Technical Interests and Experience

  - [Enjoys balancing creativity with technical challenges](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Previous experience developing editorial products and improving technology](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Created interactive AI vocabulary guide at McKinsey, working closely with tech team](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Interested in providing detailed feedback to improve GrowthX's platform](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### GrowthX Company Culture and Challenges

  - [Action-oriented team, open to process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Rapid growth (1-2 new clients per week) creating efficiency challenges](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Focus on improving onboarding, training, and standardizing processes](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Content managers have diverse backgrounds (security, consulting, journalism)](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Platform adoption varies; some resistance to change when issues arise](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to meet with Matthew for next interview round](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [GrowthX team to evaluate David's fit for the role, considering his extensive experience and technical interests](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Potential discussion on how David's existing clients could be integrated into GrowthX's workflow](https://fathom.video/share/iyE7KHbE_cAqj_qavwiFpzg8iRHx_ggy?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
